etymology: Fernwright = fern-worker / crafter of delicate things
wordplay_note: A maker of fragile things in a fragile universe
card_description: Joe Fernwright (meaning "Fernwright = fern-worker / crafter of delicate things") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Galactic Pot-Healer*. Pot-healer whose name is an anagram exercise and whose craft is nearly obsolete. Name note: A maker of fragile things in a fragile universe. The obsolete craftsman finding purpose through divine commission. First appears in *Galactic Pot-Healer*.

reference.brief: Pot-healer whose name is an anagram exercise and whose craft is nearly obsolete
reference.etymology: Fernwright = fern-worker / crafter of delicate things
reference.significance: The obsolete craftsman finding purpose through divine commission
